description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:10-stretch Docker image. Define a global before_script that runs "apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq firefox-esr", then "npm install", and finally "npm install ember-cli -g" for every job. Add an ember_test job (which runs in the default test stage) that executes the command "ember test". No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
